subject: migrate odl to silicon-sr1
commit_message:
migrate odl to silicon-sr1

switched to 0.14.1 and adapt patches

Issue-ID: CCSDK-3364
Signed-off-by: Michael DÜrre <michael.duerre@highstreet-technologies.com>
Change-Id: Idcf66d78f516898f568d4c3014d10c37a4702380
Signed-off-by: Michael DÜrre <michael.duerre@highstreet-technologies.com>

This build is probably failing because we need to first merge ccsdk/parent change and remerge ccsdk/sli , ccsdk/oran and ccsdk/features in order to match dependency versions in feature.xml files with versions delivered in silicon sr1

Patch Set 1:

ODL is not coming up after sli remerge, please check !

Patch Set 1:

+1 vote was somehow came from merge-verification job, that's strange in two ways:
1) merge-verification should be triggered before submitting the review request
2) merge-verification doesn't/shouldn't actually vote at all

and merge-verification was actually failed when review was submitted and trying remerge to check if changes are good as per silicon-sr1
